name: living-well-slogans
description: Evidence-checked public-health slogans and the evidence behind each one.

scripts.deck:ages: npm run deck:gen && marp -I slides/_generated -o _site && marp -I slides/_generated --pdf --allow-local-files -o _site
scripts.deck: npm run deck:talk && npm run deck:ages
scripts.deck:html: marp slides/deck.md -o _site/deck.html && npm run deck:gen && marp -I slides/_generated -o _site
